title: fak — the agent kernel · hero reveal
source: design panel (3 directors + judge synthesis), 2026-06-21; animated turn-tax hero added 2026-06-21

scenes.headline: fak — the agent kernel
scenes.subcaption: Treat the model like an untrusted program, and the tool call like a syscall.

scenes.headline: Re-prefill is linear. Resident KV is not.
scenes.subcaption: Agents reread the same setup every turn — modeled 9.7× less prefill at 8 workers vs the naive floor.
scenes.footer: WebVoyager, 643 tasks · modeled geometry (no wall-clock) · baseline = re-prefill on a cold KV miss

scenes.headline: The fix is two flips
scenes.subcaption: 1 · Policy runs inside the kernel — default-deny, fail-closed.    2 · The KV cache becomes addressable.
scenes.footer: reach into the middle of a kept run, cut one span, leave it bit-for-bit identical

scenes.headline: Raw speed is only the left edge
scenes.subcaption: From raw parity, through proven reuse, to agent-scale leverage.
scenes.footer: same kernel held constant — what moves is the workload size

scenes.headline: fak owns the whole boundary
scenes.subcaption: Serving stacks span one band. fak's KV cache is addressable.
scenes.footer: which effects · which results · when reuse is legal

scenes.headline: Three pillars, one honest fence
scenes.subcaption: Conservative 4.1× vs a tuned warm-cache SOTA stack · bit-exact reuse max|Δ|=0 · default-deny gate ≈362 ns.
scenes.footer: single-stream throughput shown honestly, not hidden

scenes.headline: Eight axes, one honest reference each
scenes.subcaption: fak (green) vs a real SOTA baseline — including the panel where llama.cpp leads.
scenes.footer: no fake competitor numbers · [NAIVE] multipliers stay fenced and greyed

scenes.headline: One pure-Go kernel, everywhere
scenes.subcaption: 4 platforms · 2 CPU ISAs · 4 GPU backends · 4 OSes — bit-exact on each.
scenes.footer: the boundary holds the same everywhere it runs · max|Δ|=0

scenes.headline: fak — the agent kernel
scenes.subcaption: Policy inside the kernel. The cache made addressable.
